news.headline: Ageras acquires Storebuddy as its 7th company, following Shine in 2024 from Société Générale. Expanding in Denmark.
news.summary: In Copenhagen, Denmark on February 13, 2025, accounting platform Ageras acquired Danish payment reconciliation software Storebuddy, marking its seventh company acquisition. This follows its purchase of business banking provider Shine from Société Générale in 2024. This move aims to complement Ageras' services and expand its offerings.

news.headline: Commerzbank to reduce workforce in Frankfurt while hiring abroad, affecting a significant number of employees.
PBOC: We will implement appropriately loose monetary policy
PBOC expect China's economy to maintain stable growth in 2025
German Economy Ministry Report: There are still no sign of a turnaround in the industrial economy
German Economy Ministry Report: Concerns about job security and ongoing geopolitical uncertainties continue to hinder a noticeable recovery in the consumer climate
Revving secures £107M investment to revolutionize adtech payment, boosting UK competitiveness.
news.summary: London-based fintech scale-up Revving has unveiled a groundbreaking investment of £107 million from DWS, one of the world’s largest asset managers. This investment includes £100 million in debt funding aimed at revolutionizing the UK adtech industry and broader digital economy. Through an innovative approach to invoice factoring, Revving seeks to enhance UK competitiveness in the global adtech market.

news.headline: Elon Musk calls for the US government to delete entire agencies: 'remove the roots of the weed’.
Global observed oil stockpiles fell 17.1m bbl in December - IEA
Global oil demand growth averaged 870k b/d in 2024 - IEA
Global oil supply to rise 1.6m b/d to 104.5m in 2025 - IEA
Global oil supply fell 950k b/d in January on cold weather - IEA
Xsolla partners with Day of the Devs in 2025, flagging support for new game dev. LOS ANGELES--Xsolla sponsors Day of the Devs.
news.summary: Xsolla, a prominent worldwide video game commerce company, has revealed their 2025 primary sponsorship for Day of the Devs, a non-profit group that honors the creativity, diversity, and enchantment of video games. This partnership signifies Xsolla's dedication to supporting game developers and uniting creative talents and opportunities globally. By sponsoring Day of the Devs, Xsolla aims to empower developers and create a positive impact on game development.

news.headline: Barco partners with Neat for seamless collaboration in meeting rooms - Neat Bar 2 and Pro now ClickShare certified.
news.summary: In KORTRIJK, Belgium and OSLO, Norway, Barco, a major player in meeting room technology, has announced a new partnership with Neat, a company specializing in user-friendly video devices. This collaboration aims to enhance the convenience and versatility of meeting rooms. In line with this partnership, the Neat Bar 2 and Neat Bar Pro devices have obtained ClickShare certification, ensuring seamless wireless conferencing experiences for users. ClickShare, a leading brand in wireless presentation and conferencing solutions, facilitates this integration.

news.headline: AI-driven cloud expansion in France faces challenge to balance cost reduction: ISG report. #AI #Cloud #France
news.summary: In France, enterprises are under pressure to enhance their cloud investments for AI integration while simultaneously reducing expenses, according to ISG. The drive to boost artificial intelligence adoption is prompting businesses to allocate more resources towards cloud technology. This dual challenge is prevalent within the French business sector.

news.headline: At MWC Barcelona, IOWN Global Forum to present network innovations at booth Stand 2B40 and discuss on March 4.
news.summary: In Barcelona, Spain, the Innovative Optical and Wireless Network Global Forum (IOWN Global Forum) will be sharing updates at MWC Barcelona about its advancements in creating a more efficient world through cutting-edge communication infrastructure. The Forum will be demonstrating its achievements at Hall 2, Stand 2B40 with exhibits and informational sessions. A special half-day session is scheduled for Tuesday, March 4 to delve into the impact of next-generation communications and infrastructure. This event will feature discussions on the Forum's initiatives and innovations.

news.headline: Ricardo to supply bespoke manual transmissions for Singer’s Type 964 Porsche 911, exclusive to Singer Classic Turbo and DLS Turbo restorations.
news.summary: LONDON--Ricardo, an international consulting firm, has recently agreed to provide custom manual transmissions to Singer's facilities in the United States and the United Kingdom. These specialized transmissions are unique to Singer and will first be offered to customers utilizing Singer's Classic Turbo or DLS Turbo restoration services for their Type 964 Porsche 911. Singer made a prominent entrance into the automotive industry in 2009 with their Classic services. This partnership marks a significant collaboration in the automotive sector and aims to cater to the discerning needs of owners seeking high-quality restoration services for their Porsche models.

news.headline: IEA: China’s use of gasoline, jet/kerosene, and gasoil declined marginally in 2024
IEA: Fuel use in China has already reached a plateau and may even have passed its peak
IEA raises 2025 world oil demand growth forecast to 1.1 million barrels per day (previous forecast 1.05 million bpd)
IEA: Russian oil flows so far continue largely unaffected by latest US sanctions - Monthly report
IEA raises 2025 oil demand growth est. 50k b/d, cuts 2024 by 70k
Mitel praised by Frost & Sullivan for advancing crisis management with CEM solutions; streamlining response to events.
news.summary: Mitel CEM has integrated risk intelligence, communication, and operational workflows into one centralized dashboard to enhance decision-making and promote a cohesive response to any situation. The innovation was announced in San Antonio on February 13, 2025. This consolidation aims to streamline processes and facilitate a coordinated strategy.

news.headline: Lexsoft introduces Ethical Walls Capability for T3 Search, integrates with iManage SPM in the cloud, plans integration with Intapp Walls in Q2 2025.
news.summary: Today, Lexsoft Systems announced the seamless integration of T3 Search with ethical walls application iManage SPM in the cloud. The integration is currently available, with plans to integrate with Intapp Walls in the second quarter of 2025. This announcement was made in London and Madrid on February 13, 2025. Lexsoft Systems is a leading provider of IT and business process solutions.

news.headline: Buyback transaction data from Feb 6-12, 2025, released. Details include important numbers.
Ooredoo Qatar partners with Nokia for 5G Standalone Core to enhance services and create new revenue channels.
news.summary: Ooredoo Qatar has announced its adoption of Nokia's 5G Standalone Core technology to enhance network services and explore new income prospects. The move entails leveraging Nokia's cutting-edge infrastructure to bolster connectivity and pave the way for innovative offerings. This strategic alliance is expected to not only elevate the quality of services provided by Ooredoo Qatar but also drive revenue growth through the introduction of revolutionary services.

news.headline: CLIQ to announce full year 2024 financial results and highlights on Feb 20, 2025 in Düsseldorf.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, in Düsseldorf, the CLIQ Group announced that it will disclose its audited financial results and key highlights for the full year of 2024 on Thursday, February 20, 2025.

news.headline: Advantest to showcase latest test solutions at SEMICON Korea 2025, Feb. 19-21 in Seoul. Highlighting leading-edge test technology for memory, 5G, AI, and HPC. Promoting ESG initiatives as a founding member of SEMI’s SCC.
news.summary: Advantest Corporation, a prominent supplier of semiconductor test equipment listed as TSE: 6857, is set to exhibit its newest test solutions at SEMICON Korea 2025 from Feb. 19-21 at COEX in Seoul, South Korea. The event will feature Advantest's wide range of cutting-edge test technology tailored for various applications, including advanced memory, 5G, artificial intelligence (AI), and high-performance computing (HPC). Moreover, being part of SEMI’s Semiconductor Climate Consortium (SCC) from its inception, the company aims to spotlight its ESG efforts during the upcoming showcase.

news.headline: West Red Lake Gold is updating Madsen Mine progress: bulk sample underway, drift 80% complete, facility installs advancing.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 13, 2025, West Red Lake Gold Mines Ltd. announced an update on its Madsen Mine project in the Red Lake Gold District of Northwestern Ontario, Canada. The company, listed under TSXV as WRLG and OTCQB as WRLGF, shared progress on restart readiness activities. These activities include the ongoing bulk sample being conducted at the mine. West Red Lake Gold Mines Ltd. owns 100% of the Madsen Mine project, showing commitment to advancing their operations in the region.

news.headline: Dreamstime in Brentwood introduces AI keywording tool for stock images, saving time with automated metadata generation.
news.summary: A new AI keywording tool has been unveiled by Dreamstime in Brentwood, Tennessee. This tool automates the generation of metadata for stock photos and illustrations, including titles, descriptions, keywords, and categories. Utilizing Dreamstime's proprietary AI trained on a vast collection of one billion images, this tool instantly crafts metadata directly from the image. The introduction of this feature aims to streamline the submission process, saving time for contributors, and improving search accuracy for buyers.

news.headline: Hong Kong elderly use healthcare vouchers in Zhongshan's Chenxinghai Hospital since July 2024.
news.summary: In February 13, 2025, it was reported that in July 2024, elderly health care vouchers from Hong Kong were deemed valid for use at Zhongshan Chenxinghai Hospital in China. The hospital became the initial facility where this exchange was permitted, signifying a significant development in cross-border health care cooperation.

news.headline: Coinbase in talks to return to India after exiting in 2023, as FIU relaxes rules on offshore crypto exchanges.
news.summary: Coinbase is currently engaging in discussions with Indian authorities to potentially reestablish its presence in the market following its exit in 2023. This move comes as the Financial Intelligence Unit (FIU) of India appears to be relaxing its position on offshore cryptocurrency exchanges. The development signals a shift in regulatory dynamics, indicating a possible opening for Coinbase to return to the Indian market. This could be a significant move considering the ever-growing interest in cryptocurrencies in India, where the number of crypto users has been steadily increasing in recent years.

news.headline: In 2025, South Korea will let institutions sell crypto donations; 3,500 firms may open real-name accounts on exchanges.
news.summary: As part of a pilot program, approximately 3,500 corporations and professional investors will be permitted by the country's securities regulator to establish "real-name" accounts on cryptocurrency exchanges.

news.headline: Chevron to cut 20% workforce, targeting $2-3 billion reduction by 2026. About 9,000 employees may be affected. Responsible leadership cited.
news.summary: Chevron Corp. (NYSE: CVX), a major oil company, has revealed plans to reduce its workforce by up to 20% in a move to save costs. The company announced its intention to begin significant layoffs this year, with aims to complete most of them by the end of 2026. As part of a broader cost-cutting strategy, Chevron is looking to achieve a $2 billion to $3 billion reduction by the end of 2026. With a current employee count of 45,600 as of December 2023, a 20% reduction could mean over 9,000 employees being let go. Vice Chairman Mark Nelson assured that the company will provide full support to those affected during this transition period. The decision was made in the interest of enhancing the long-term competitiveness of Chevron for its employees, shareholders, and communities.

news.headline: BNB price surges due to CZ's memecoin interest, MyShell IDO launch, and other factors.
news.summary: The increase in the price of BNB can be attributed to various factors, including CZ's unexpected involvement in memecoins and the recent launch of the MyShell IDO. These developments have contributed to a notable rise in BNB's value, with the cryptocurrency experiencing a X% increase in the past week alone. Additionally, other undisclosed reasons have also played a role in driving BNB's price up amidst market fluctuations.

Alibaba soars on AI rally, reaching highest level since 2022.
Industrial sector and industry performance stats from Bloomberg: strong numbers reported.
Earnings scheduled for February 13th, 2025 show various companies reporting with revenue and earnings estimates.
news.summary: Various companies are set to report their quarterly earnings before the bell. Some key numbers include: - Penske Automotive Group (PAG): Earnings expected at $3.29 per share on revenue of $7.57 billion- Brookfield (BN): Earnings projected at $0.88 per share on revenue of $1.32 billion- TransUnion (TRU): Earnings projected at $0.96 per share on revenue of $1.03 billion- American Electric Power (AEP): Earnings expected at $1.22 per share on revenue of $4.87 billion- Deere (DE): Earnings projected at $3.11 per share on revenue of $7.69 billion- Honda Motor Co (HMC): Earnings for the third quarter- Sony Gr (SONY): Earnings estimated at $0.29 per share on revenue of $24.32 billion- ASE Tech Holding Co (ASX): Earnings likely at $0.15 per share on revenue of $5.83 billion- Barclays (BCS): Earnings estimated at $0.19 per share on revenue of $6.57 billion- TELUS (TU): Earnings projected at $0.15 per share on revenue of $5.24 billionThese reports, amongst others, will be available on Benzinga.com for further details.

news.headline: Gupshup showcases AI agents at LEAP 2025 in Saudi Arabia, leading Conversational AI platform.
news.summary: In Riyadh, Saudi Arabia on February 13, 2025, Gupshup, a renowned Conversational AI platform, presented its advanced AI Agent features at LEAP 2025, a top technology event in the country. After a successful showcase, the company revealed its latest updates, with the event drawing attention to its innovative AI capabilities.

news.headline: Global Proton Exchange Membrane Fuel Cell Market to reach USD 13,238.06 Million by 2034, at 14.68% CAGR. Key growth drivers include govt initiatives and increased demand for clean energy solutions.
news.summary: The article discusses the global Proton Exchange Membrane Fuel Cell (PEMFC) market, forecasting its growth from approximately USD 3,364.71 million in 2024 to an estimated value of around USD 13,238.06 million by 2034. The compound annual growth rate (CAGR) is expected to be about 14.68% during the period from 2025 to 2034. PEMFCs convert chemical energy into electrical energy through the electrochemical reaction of hydrogen and oxygen, providing high efficiency and low greenhouse gas emissions. Factors driving market growth include government initiatives supporting clean energy solutions, demand for renewable energy storage, and low-emission backup power needs. Challenges include competition from alternative electric vehicles and high hydrogen production costs. The report segments the market by type, material, application, and region, with the Asia Pacific region currently leading due to government support and key industry players. North America and Europe are also expected to see significant growth, driven by government targets and investment in research and development. Contunuous research efforts focus on improving PEMFC technology and expanding its applications. The report provides in-depth industry analysis and revenue estimation, with a free sample available for further insights.

news.headline: Tune into Bloomberg on 2/13/2024 to catch Insight with Host Haslinda Amin.
Global home Wi-Fi router market to grow by USD 3.34 billion (2025-2029) due to e-learning surge, AI influence - Technavio
news.summary: A recent report detailing the influence of AI on market trends reveals that the global home wi-fi router market is projected to increase by approximately USD 3.34 billion between 2025 and 2029. The growth is anticipated to occur at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 12.5% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: Roanoke Insurance Group marks 90 years of excellence and innovation in logistics & trade insurance since its 1935 inception.
news.summary: Roanoke Insurance Group is marking a significant milestone, commemorating its 90 years of operation as a leading and reliable company in the logistics and trade insurance sector. Established in 1935 in Chicago, Illinois, Roanoke has maintained a position of leadership by introducing groundbreaking solutions tailored to meet the industry's evolving needs. Over nearly a century, the company has built a reputation for excellence and has become a trusted partner for clients seeking specialized insurance services.

news.headline: Trepp introduces AI search tool to improve use of TreppCRE for real estate professionals. Expands capabilities.
news.summary: A major data firm, Trepp, unveiled groundbreaking artificial intelligence (AI) technology on Feb. 12, 2025. The innovative AI tools introduced include AI search, aimed at improving user experience with TreppCRE. This new feature is set to revolutionize how industry experts access and interpret data from TreppCRE, a move that solidifies Trepp's position as a forward-thinking leader in the field. This development is expected to significantly impact professionals in the industry and is a testament to Trepp's commitment to innovation and efficiency in data management.

news.headline: National Dental launches Smyles For Heroes program to donate full arch dental restoration services to 1 qualifying veteran or first responder each month. Applications accepted online at SmylesForHeroes.com. New York, Feb. 12, 2025.
news.summary: National Dental will choose one eligible veteran or first responder each month who is missing multiple teeth or currently using a denture. Nominations can be submitted online at SmylesForHeroes.com. The initiative was launched in New York on February 12, 2025, by Dr. Nitin at National Dental.

news.headline: Paris Baguette plans to expand in North America with a target of 1,000 locations by 2030, establishing its first manufacturing plant in Texas.
news.summary: A popular franchise cafe inspired by French bakery culture is rapidly expanding, with plans to achieve a significant milestone of 1,000 outlets throughout North America by 2030. The company's headquarters in Moonachie, New Jersey announced this ambitious goal on February 12, 2025. Paris Baguette, renowned for its expertly made pastries and artisanal breads, is set to dominate the market with its growth plans.

news.headline: UFC® and Monster Energy® renew global partnership, with Monster serving as exclusive global drink partner.
news.summary: The renowned mixed martial arts organization UFC®, affiliated with TKO Group Holdings (NYSE: TKO), and Monster Energy, a leading energy drink brand, have recently confirmed a multiyear extension of their established collaboration. This deal ensures Monster Energy remains the sole global partner for UFC®, maintaining their ongoing support.

news.headline: USA DeBusk LLC acquires CIMA Inspection, enhancing NDT capabilities. DEER PARK, Feb. 12, 2025. #IndustrialServices #Acquisition #NDT
news.summary: Deer Park, Texas - On February 12, 2025, USA DeBusk LLC, a prominent industrial services provider, made a strategic decision to expand and reinforce their non-destructive testing capabilities. This move aims to augment their overall multi-service value proposition. The company's objective is to enhance their offerings to the energy sector and beyond. This strategic decision underscores their commitment to growth and diversification.

news.headline: Ephlux partners with Denovo to bring no-code platform to North America's biggest JD Edwards customer base, announced on Feb. 12, 2025.
news.summary: A partnership has been announced between Ephlux, a leading global enterprise specializing in no-code app automation, and Denovo, a major North American provider of JD Edwards (JDE) consulting and cloud managed services. The collaboration was made official in Louisville, Colorado on February 12, 2025. Ephlux's expertise in no-code app automation combined with Denovo's strong presence in JDE services is anticipated to bring unparalleled benefits to clients.
